free_text: Cross sections, angular distributions, and magnetic
substate populations in the 23Na(n,n'gamma)reaction
5.5MeV HVEC model CN Van de Graaff.
For 1.0-4.4 MeV neutrons.
For 0.52-0.94 MeV neutrons.
Energy spread 60 keV or less for 0.52 To 0.94 MeV,
130 keV at  1 MeV, and 40 keV at 40 MeV.
Sodium cylinder, density 0.963 g/cm**2, covered with
thin film of oil housed in 3 sheaths of rubber.
Sample positioned 11.4 cm from source.
Ge(Li) gamma ray detector with active face area
of 9.4 cm**2 placed on tracks for radial and
angular movement. Detector shielding by lead tube,
solid copper bar and lithium carbonate with paraffin
mixture.
Pilot B scintillator, optically coupled to RCA photo-
multiplier at 45 deg. and 125 degrees with respect to
neutron source, used as time-of-flight monitor.
Hansen and McKibben type long counter used as
flux monitor.
approved by D.R.Donati, 78/6/27.
Data taken from tables in thesis.
